eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Gunnison; Ouray; Montrose, CO; at 7:03 AM on JUL 6, 2026 Effective until 3:03 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: WILDFIRE- MANDATORY EVACUATION ORDER for the area South of Storm King, east of Cimmaron Ridge to County Rd 864A in the Cimmaron Valley to the US Forest Service boundary due to a fast moving wildfire. This includes the Bear Claw, Silver Jack, Eagles Rest, and Little Bighorn subdivisions. LEAVE NOW. Refer to Zone 32 on the map - emergency.gunnisoncounty.org WILDFIRE- MANDATORY EVACUATION ORDER for the area South of Storm King, east of Cimmaron Ridge to County Rd 864A in the Cimmaron Valley to the US Forest Service boundary due to a fast moving wildfire.
